title: Ransomware encryption activity on primary customer database
observations: Process spawned from a non-standard path began renaming files with a .blackhaze extension.
Outbound TLS connection to 185.220.101.47 immediately before mass file writes.
SMB authentication attempts from srv-db-01 to srv-app-01 and srv-dc-01 using a service account.
Ransom note 'RECOVER_YOUR_FILES.txt' dropped in multiple directories.
raw_signal: DetectName=Ransomware.BlackHaze Severity=Critical Tactic=Impact Technique=T1486 DataEncryptedForImpact Host=srv-db-01
_demo_note: THE contested incident. Ransomware (Intel: isolate+wipe now, lateral movement high) on the customer_pii host (Compliance: GDPR 72h clock + evidence preservation -> VETO the wipe). The conflict is produced by the agents' own tools, not scripted.
